title: Pengesahan Persetujuan Antara Pemerintah Republik Indonesia dan Pemerintah Daerah Administrasi Khusus Hongkong Republik Rakyat China Tentang Bantuan Hukum Timbal Balik dalam Masalah Pidana (agreement Between The Government of The Hongkong Special Administrative Region of The People's Republic of China Concerning Mutual Legal Assistance In Criminal Matters)

provisions.title: UU 3/2012 - Summary
provisions.content:
Pengesahan Persetujuan Antara Pemerintah Republik Indonesia dan Pemerintah Daerah Administrasi Khusus Hongkong Republik Rakyat China Tentang Bantuan Hukum Timbal Balik dalam Masalah Pidana (agreement Between The Government of The Hongkong Special Administrative Region of The People's Republic of China Concerning Mutual Legal Assistance In Criminal Matters)
Type: UU No. 3 of 2012
Status: in_force
Source: https://peraturan.go.id/id/uu-no-3-tahun-2012
